title: cola boxiana
intro: Cola boxiana, also known as the West African cola tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. It is a deciduous tree that is native to tropical Africa, and its seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The seeds of Cola boxiana are also valued for their health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Cola boxiana seeds can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
